creator: alike-laura-beck@zq8.de
text:
That does indeed fix it, thank you.

Given the documentation in `man 5 pkg.conf` and `man 7 pkg` that behaviour of mirror_type is not really clear to me. I infer from the documentation that mirror_type is used for the url field, which seems not to be the case. I assume that the mirror is something different than given in the url. It'd be nice to have a more detailed explanation in the man pages.
